summary: Frontend-only review of eminwux.dev personal homepage. All 9 requested features verified PASS via Playwright on the live preview URL. No console errors, no page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Nav active-section detection in Nav.jsx uses only `top <= 120` without a lower bound, so the last matching section wins. This works in practice because the loop iterates top-to-bottom, but it can briefly highlight a later section while scrolling fast. Consider `top <= 120 && bottom > 120`.
Hero.jsx imports `Comment` from Terminal but does not use it (only Contact uses it). Same for Contact.jsx importing PROFILE/Mail icons — minor unused imports, harmless but worth cleaning.
site.js: footer year computed at render time (`new Date().getFullYear()`) — currently shows 2026 because system time is Jan 2026. This is fine for now but verify no copy assumes 2025.
YouTube thumbnails load from i.ytimg.com — if blocked by CSP/network the cards will show broken images. Consider an onError fallback to a placeholder.
No backend integration exists for this app (intentional per PRD). The default FastAPI /api stub is untouched — not tested.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static SPA at /. All data-testids in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds.js match between components and tests. Verified at viewport 1920x1080 (desktop) and 375x800 (mobile). Verified: hero renders 'Emiliano Spinella' h1; typewriter prints whoami/cat /etc/role/uname -a/echo $TAGLINE; sticky nav has all 5 anchors; nav-projects click scrolls projects-section to y=0 and active link color is rgb(163,230,53) lime; both project cards (kukeon, sbsh) render with kukeon.io+repo and sbsh.io+repo; all 6 video cards present with correct https://www.youtube.com/watch?v={id} hrefs (Kqbg1xHZbuw, RJYe_uRVJi4, tWVU7fEeH-8, nH6b23P-4MQ, AJjJnbGW3OM, FscVGsYcdDQ); 3 playlist cards; contact rows have mailto:hello@eminwux.dev, github.com/eminwux, x.com/eminwux, linkedin.com/in/eminwux, youtube.com/@eminwux; top-nav social icons have same correct URLs; footer shows '© 2026 Emiliano Spinella' + .caret element; at 375px nav-about is hidden while logo and social icons remain visible; 0 console errors, 0 page errors.
